data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a referral leaderboard/gamification, which is explicitly listed in the needs of the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete details or data points that confirm the existence or functionality of a leaderboard or gamification system. The absence of this critical feature indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence fails to demonstrate that this aspect of the referral program is implemented or operational.
gaps: No evidence of a referral leaderboard or gamification system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
